title: Menispermum hexagynum
uses: Menispermum hexagynum, a plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The roots and stems of the plant are often used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. In some Asian cultures, Menispermum hexagynum is also believed to have antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for wound healing. The class of Menispermaceae is Magnoliopsida, also known as flowering plants. Menispermum hexagynum is a member of the kingdom Plantae, which includes all types of plants.
